sections.paragraph:
πλεονεξία, ας, ἡ [πλεονέκτης]

—1. ‘motivating force for gaining someth. beyond an acceptable standard’, greed, avarice Ro 1:29; Col 3:5; 1 Th 2:5; ἐν πλεονεξία out of greed Eph 4:19; 2 Pt 2:3.

—2. by metonymy of concrete for abstract, ‘expression or exhibition of greed’, greedy act, extortion Mk 7:22; Lk 12:15; 2 Cor 9:5; Eph 5:3; 2 Pt 2:14.
